THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZDUNIAK, GREG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 GUERRERO STREET #5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-24-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO RENTS OR DAMAGES AWARDED TO PLTF. PLTF. RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. PLTF. MAY APPLY FOR WRIT AT ANY TIME AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND SUCH WRIT WILL ISSUE FORTHWITH AND PRIOR POSTING OF PREMISE IS PERMITTED. NO FURTHER STAYS BEYOND 3/24/97.
